name: io.github.lennney/agent-search-mcp
description: 11-engine MCP search server for AI agents. Free, zero API keys needed. Waterfall, verify, extract.

environmentVariables.description: Brave Search API key (optional, enables Brave engine)
environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Tavily Search API key (optional, enables Tavily engine)
environmentVariables.name: TAVILY_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Exa Search API key (optional, enables Exa engine)
environmentVariables.name: EXA_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Run mode: stdio (default), http, or both
environmentVariables.name: MODE
